content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>gc过程的markl跟sweep是什么阶段做的操作,具体操作干了啥,目的是啥</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-14</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

--- MODE SWITCH: PROGRESS SUMMARY --- ⚠️ CRITICAL TAG REQUIREMENT — READ CAREFULLY: • You MUST wrap your ENTIRE response in ... tags. • Do NOT use tags. output will be DISCARDED and cause a system error. • The ONLY accepted root tag is . Any other root tag is a protocol violation. PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT =========================== Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request. Claude's Full Response to User: # Android ART CMC GC: Mark-Compact 完整流程详解 [知识来源: Web 搜索 - 4 引擎并行] - Serper Google: `Android ART MarkCompact userfaultfd concurrent mark compact GC Android 14` - DuckDuckGo: `ART MarkCompact RunPhases CompactionPhase userfaultfd uffd live word` - Tavily (advanced): `Android 14 ART Mark Compact garbage collector userfaultfd implementation phases sliding compaction` - MiniMax 中文: `Android 14 ART CMC GC mark compact 用户态缺页 userfaultfd 滑动压缩 阶段` [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/mark_compact.cc] [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/mark_compact.h] [知识来源: 技术披露 - Utilizing the Linux Userfaultfd System Call in a Compaction Phase of a GC, tdcommons.org] [置信度: 高] (task list 跟当前一次性 Q&A 关系不大,跳过 TaskCreate;如果你后续要把这部分沉淀到 `docs/exploration/`,那一步再开 task。) --- ## 0. 为什么 ART 要从 CC 切到 CMC CC (Concurrent Copying, Android 8 ~ 13 默认) 的代价: - **空间冗余**: from-space 和 to-space 各占一份,实际可用堆 ≈ 物理堆 / 2 - **Read Barrier 永远在线**: 每次读引用字段都走一次 RB slow-path 检查 forwarding,有 CPU 开销 - **GC 期间 working set 翻倍**: 拷贝过程同时占用 from + to,峰值 RSS 高 CMC (Concurrent Mark Compact, Android 14+ 默认) 的卖点: - **就地压缩**: 同一段虚拟地址空间被压缩,无需另开一份 to-space → **省半数堆 RAM** - **无需 Read Barrier**: 用 **userfaultfd (uffd)** 让 kernel 在 mutator 访问"还没搬完"的页时阻塞,GC 线程把页搬好后 `UFFDIO_COPY` ioctl 唤醒 — 等价于"按需的 read barrier",但是免费的 (kernel 帮你做) - **碎片消失**: compaction 自带 defrag,长期跑下来不会出现"明明有 20MB 空闲但分配不下 8MB Bitmap"的情况 代价: 内核必须 ≥ 5.7 (`UFFD_FEATURE_SIGBUS` 才能开启 CMC),否则 fall back 到 CC。 --- ## 1. 主流程 `MarkCompact::RunPhases()` AOSP master 源码原文: ```cpp void MarkCompact::RunPhases() { InitializePhase(); { ReaderMutexLock mu(self, *Locks::mutator_lock_); MarkingPhase(); } // 并发 { ScopedPause pause(this); MarkingPause(); } // STW { ReaderMutexLock mu(self, *Locks::mutator_lock_); ReclaimPhase(); perform_compaction = PrepareForCompaction(); } // 并发 if (perform_compaction) { runtime->GetThreadList()->FlipThreadRoots(...); // STW (FlipCallback → CompactionPause) if (IsValidFd(uffd_)) { ReaderMutexLock mu(self, *Locks::mutator_lock_); CompactionPhase(); // 并发,核心! } } FinishPhase(perform_compaction); } ``` 七个阶段, **两个 STW pause**: ``` ┌─ InitializePhase (准备) ├─ MarkingPhase (并发) ──┐ ├─ MarkingPause ★ STW ├─ Mark 系列,跟 CMS 几乎一样 ├─ ReclaimPhase (并发) ──┘ ├─ PrepareForCompaction (并发,核心算法) ├─ CompactionPause ★ STW (FlipThreadRoots) ├─ CompactionPhase (并发,userfaultfd 驱动) ← CMC 的灵魂 └─ FinishPhase ``` --- ## 2. 第一段: Mark 系列 (1 ~ 4 阶段) ### 2.1 InitializePhase - 清空 `mark_stack_`、`chunk_info_vec_`、`first_objs_moving_space_`/`first_objs_non_moving_space_` 等数据结构 - 重置计数器,缓存 `from_space_slide_diff` (`from_space_begin_ - bump_pointer_space_->Begin()`) - 代际模式 (`use_generational_`) 下清空 `class_after_obj_map_` **目的**: 给本轮 GC 准备干净的状态机。 ### 2.2 MarkingPhase (并发) 跟 CMS 的 mark 阶段几乎相同: - `BindAndResetBitmaps()`: 圈定 immune space,重置主 space 的 mark bitmap - `MarkRoots()`: 线程根 / JNI / 类加载器 / intern strings - `MarkReachableObjects()` + `ScanObject()` + `ProcessMarkStack()`: 三色追踪 - write barrier + card table 处理并发期间引用变更 **目的**: 跟 CMS 一样 — 在 mark bitmap 中标出"所有从根可达的对象"。 ### 2.3 MarkingPause (STW 补漏) - **撤销 TLAB**: `RevokeAllThreadLocalBuffers()` — TLAB (Thread Local Allocation Buffer) 是 mutator 在 bump pointer space 中私有的分配缓冲,STW 前必须撤回主分配指针 - **设定 `black_allocations_begin_`**: 这是一个关键水位线 — STW 之后所有新分配出来的对象都在它之后,统一视为"黑色 (已存活)",不需要重新 trace - `ReMarkRoots()`: 重扫根,catch 并发期间新增的 - `RecursiveMarkDirtyObjects()`: 扫脏 card 上的灰对象 - `SwapStacks()`: 翻转 alloc / live stack - `EnableSlowPath()`: 让 Reference 处理走 slow path,准备 sweep system weaks **目的**: 把并发标记的"漏标"补齐;立一条 `black_allocations_begin_` 水位线,把"STW 前的对象"和"STW 后的对象"分开处理。 ### 2.4 ReclaimPhase (这里是非 moving space 的 sweep) - `ProcessReferences()`: Soft/Weak/Phantom/Finalizer 同 CMS - `SweepSystemWeaks()`: intern table、JIT inline cache、JNI weak global - `Sweep()` + `SwapBitmaps()`: **只 sweep 非 moving space (large object space / non-moving space)** - `UnBindBitmaps()` **这里有个关键区别**: moving space (bump-pointer space) **不在 sweep 范围内**,它的死对象不需要逐个还给 freelist — 因为接下来 compaction 会把活对象搬走、整片 from-space 直接释放。 --- ## 3. 第二段: Compact 系列 (5 ~ 7 阶段) — CMC 的精华 ### 3.1 PrepareForCompaction (并发,核心算法) 这是 CMC 最巧妙的部分,准备"**每个对象搬到哪里**"。 **输入**: mark bitmap (谁活着) + chunk_info_vec_ (按 chunk 统计活字节数) **输出**: 一组前缀和数组,用来 O(1) 查询任意对象的 post-compaction 地址 具体做的事: #### ① ComputeLiveWordsBitmap / chunk_info_vec_ - 把 moving space 切成固定大小的 chunk (典型 4 KB / page) - 对每个 chunk 统计"存活字节数 (live bytes)" - 形成数组 `chunk_info_vec_[i]` = chunk i 的活字节数 #### ② 计算前缀和 - 累加 `chunk_info_vec_`,得到"chunk i 之前一共有多少活字节" - 这就是 chunk i 整体压缩后的目标偏移 - 对于具体对象,再加上它在 chunk 内的偏移 → 得到 post-compaction 精确地址 #### ③ 确定多重边界 代码里有三条关键水位线: - **`black_dense_end_`**: chunk 存活率 ≥ `kBlackDenseRegionThreshold = 95%` 的连续前缀。这段区域 **跳过 compaction** (太满了,搬没意义) - **`mid_gen_end_`** (代际模式): 中代结束位置 - **`post_compact_end_`**: compaction 完成后的堆终点 源码注释: > "different mutators use TLABs. So we will compact the heap till the point where allocations took place before the marking-pause. And everything after that will be slid with TLAB holes" #### ④ 构建 first-objects 表 - `first_objs_moving_space_[page_idx]` = 落入第 page_idx 个目标页的第一个对象 - compaction 时只需从这个对象起,顺序搬一页的内容 **目的**: 把"压缩"这个全局算法,**预计算成局部独立的 page-level 任务**。每个 page 的压缩工作互不依赖 → 后面 CompactionPhase 才能并行/按需做。 `perform_compaction` 是这一步的返回值;如果堆几乎都活着,可以跳过 compact。 ### 3.2 CompactionPause (STW, 通过 FlipCallback) `runtime->GetThreadList()->FlipThreadRoots(...)` 会: - 暂停所有 mutator - 对每个线程调一次 `ThreadFlipVisitor`,改写线程私有引用 (TLAB 指针、interpreter cache 等) - 在 callback 内执行 `CompactionPause()`: - **KernelPreparation()**: 头文件注释原文: > "Perform all kernel operations required for concurrent compaction. Includes mremap to move pre-compact pages to from-space, followed by userfaultfd registration on the moving space and linear-alloc." - 核心操作 = `mremap()`: 把整个 moving space 的虚拟页用 mremap 移到 from-space 的虚拟地址范围 → **moving space 此刻变成空映射** - 然后在 moving space 那段虚拟地址范围上 `UFFDIO_REGISTER` 注册 userfaultfd → 从此 mutator 访问这段范围会触发 **SIGBUS** (或 uffd 缺页事件) - 更新所有线程根的引用,使其指向"压缩后的地址" (用前面算好的前缀和) - 清空 interpreter cache、调整 TLAB - pause 结束,恢复 mutator **目的**: 在 STW 内做两件原子的事 — ① 把所有现存指针改到压缩后的目标地址; ② 让 moving space 变成 "uffd 防护区" (任何访问都会被内核挂起)。 ### 3.3 CompactionPhase (并发,核心!) 这是 CMC 区别于所有其他 GC 的关键。 mutator 已经被 unsuspend,它们看到的引用都指向**压缩后的目标地址 (即原 moving space 的虚拟地址)**。但那块内存现在是空映射(被 uffd 接管)。 接下来发生: #### 路径 A: mutator 访问 → SIGBUS 触发 1. mutator 线程读/写一个引用 → 访问 moving space 中某页 P 2. 内核发现 P 没有物理页支持,且被 uffd 监控 → 发出 SIGBUS 3. ART 的 `SigbusHandler(siginfo_t* info)` 接管 (头文件注释: "Called by SIGBUS handler. NO_THREAD_SAFETY_ANALYSIS for mutator-lock") 4. handler 调用 `ConcurrentlyProcessMovingPage(fault_page, buf, ...)`: - 用前面准备的 first-objects 表找到该页对应的源对象 - 从 from-space (mremap 之前的位置) 把活对象 **拷贝到 buf** (`compaction_buffer_`) - 拷贝过程中用 `CompactPage<>` / `SlideBlackPage` **就地更新对象内引用** (因为目标地址已知) - 调用 `UFFDIO_COPY` ioctl,把 buf 内容映射回 P → P 现在有物理页了 5. 内核 resume mutator,mutator 看到的就是已就位的对象 — 它完全感知不到刚才发生了什么 #### 路径 B: GC 线程主动搬 GC 线程不等 mutator 访问,自己也从 page 0 开始逐页搬运: - 取一页,标 `PageState::kProcessing` (`Atomic* moving_pages_status_`) - 拷贝并修复引用 - `UFFDIO_COPY` 映射回去 - 标 `kProcessedAndMapped` #### 同步: PageState 状态机 每页有 7 种状态: ``` kUnprocessed → kProcessing → kProcessed → kProcessingAndMapping → kMutatorProcessing → kProcessedAndMapping → kProcessedAndMapped ``` 保证 GC 线程和 mutator (经 SIGBUS) 不会同时处理同一页。 #### 终止机制 - `conc_compaction_termination_page_`: 单独注册了一个"终止页",GC 完成所有页后访问它 → 触发 uffd 事件 → SIGBUS handler 看到 sigbus_in_progress_count_ 的 `kSigbusCounterCompactionDoneMask` → 知道压缩已结束 → 之后访问任意页都直接放行 - 内核 ≥ 5.7 的 fault-retry 特性 (`gKernelHasFaultRetry`) 简化了这块,允许同一页多次 fault #### linear-alloc 区域 ART 的 linear-alloc 池 (ArenaPool) 也得搬: - `ProcessLinearAlloc()`: GC 线程并发处理,用 `shadow-map` 临时映射 **目的**: 在 mutator 几乎不停顿的情况下,把所有活对象搬到压缩后位置,并把死对象的虚拟地址空间整体回收。userfaultfd 让 "lazy compaction" 成为可能 — 谁先访问谁先触发搬运,GC 线程在背景慢慢做。 ### 3.4 FinishPhase - 解注册 uffd (`UnregisterUffd`) - `FreeFromSpacePages()`: madvise(DONTNEED) 释放 from-space 的物理页 - 代际模式: 把 mid → old 的提升位复制到 mark bitmap - 关闭 ReferenceProcessor slow path - 重置 mark stack、统计输出 **目的**: 释放整片 from-space 内存 (这是 "等价 sweep" 的真正物理回收),收尾。 --- ## 4. 三种 GC 的横向对比 | 维度 | CMS (MarkSweep) | CC (ConcurrentCopying) | CMC (MarkCompact) | |---|---|---|---| | AOSP 默认期 | Android 5 ~ 7 | Android 8 ~ 13 | Android 14+ | | 标记阶段 | 三色,带 card table | 三色 + read barrier | 三色,带 card table (无 RB) | | 死对象回收方式 | 还给 freelist (Sweep) | 整片 from-space 释放 | 整片 from-space 释放 | | 是否压缩/搬移 | ❌ 会碎片化 | ✅ 拷贝到 to-space | ✅ 就地压缩 (mremap + uffd) | | 物理峰值堆 | 1x | 2x (from + to) | 1x (mremap 共享地址) | | Mutator 开销 | write barrier | **read barrier (热!)** | write barrier + 偶发 SIGBUS | | STW 数 | 2 (Pause + Reclaim 头) | 多 (Flip + 各 checkpoint) | 2 (MarkingPause + CompactionPause) | | 内核要求 | 无 | 无 | **≥ 5.7,需 userfaultfd SIGBUS** | | 碎片 | 严重 | 无 | 无 | --- ## 5. 完整流程图 ```mermaid flowchart TD A[GC trigger] --> B[InitializePhase
重置状态] B --> C[MarkingPhase
并发 三色追踪] C --> D[MarkingPause
★STW] D --> D1[RevokeTLAB
black_allocations_begin_ 立水位] D1 --> D2[ReMarkRoots / Dirty cards] D2 --> E[ReclaimPhase
并发 sweep 非 moving space] E --> E1[ProcessReferences/SystemWeaks] E1 --> E2[Sweep large/non-moving
moving space 不在此处] E2 --> F[PrepareForCompaction
并发] F --> F1[ComputeLiveWords
chunk_info_vec_] F1 --> F2[前缀和 → 算出每页目标地址] F2 --> F3[确定 black_dense_end
post_compact_end] F3 --> F4[first_objs 表] F4 --> G[CompactionPause
★STW via FlipThreadRoots] G --> G1[KernelPreparation
mremap 把 moving 搬到 from-space] G1 --> G2[UFFDIO_REGISTER
注册 uffd 监控 moving space] G2 --> G3[更新所有线程根指针
指向压缩后地址] G3 --> H[CompactionPhase
并发,uffd 驱动] H --> H1[GC 线程逐页搬
CompactPage/SlideBlackPage] H --> H2[mutator 访问 → SIGBUS
SigbusHandler 按需搬这页] H1 --> H3[UFFDIO_COPY ioctl
把搬好的页映射回去] H2 --> H3 H3 --> H4[PageState 状态机同步] H4 --> I[Termination Page
所有页处理完触发终止] I --> J[FinishPhase
UnregisterUffd] J --> J1[FreeFromSpacePages
madvise DONTNEED] J1 --> J2[统计/清理] ``` --- ## 6. 一句话总结(直接回答) | 问题 | 答案 | |---|---| | **Mark 阶段干啥?** | 跟 CMS 一样 — 三色追踪,把 live 对象标到 mark bitmap。MarkingPause 立 `black_allocations_begin_` 水位线把"老对象/新对象"分开 | | **Compact 阶段干啥?** | 用 mremap 把整片 moving space 搬到 from-space (改名而已,虚拟页不动),原 moving space 注册 uffd → mutator 一访问就 SIGBUS → GC 线程按需把对象 **按预计算的目标地址** 拷回去 → ioctl 映射 → mutator 透明继续 | | **为啥需要 PrepareForCompaction?** | 算前缀和,让每页的压缩任务 **彼此独立** — 这样 GC 线程和 SIGBUS handler 才能并发各搬各的 | | **死对象内存何时回收?** | FinishPhase 的 `FreeFromSpacePages()` 用 `madvise(DONTNEED)` 一次性释放整片 from-space,不需要遍历死对象 | | **跟 CC 比省在哪?** | 不要 to-space (物理 RAM 砍半),不要 read barrier (mutator 热路径无开销),代价是依赖内核 uffd + 偶尔 SIGBUS | | **跟 CMS 比省在哪?** | 没有碎片,长期跑 RSS 稳定;不要逐对象还给 freelist 的 Sweep | --- ## 知识来源(本轮实际调用) - **4 引擎 Web 搜索**: - Serper Google: `Android ART MarkCompact userfaultfd concurrent mark compact GC Android 14` - DuckDuckGo: `ART MarkCompact RunPhases CompactionPhase userfaultfd uffd live word` - Tavily (advanced): `Android 14 ART Mark Compact garbage collector userfaultfd implementation phases sliding compaction` - MiniMax: `Android 14 ART CMC GC mark compact 用户态缺页 userfaultfd 滑动压缩 阶段` - **AOSP master 源码交叉验证**: - `art/runtime/gc/collector/mark_compact.cc` (RunPhases 全流程 / userfaultfd 注释 / kBlackDenseRegionThreshold=95%) - `art/runtime/gc/collector/mark_compact.h` (KernelPreparation/CompactPage/SigbusHandler/PageState 等签名,uffd_/from_space_/compaction_buffers_map_ 等字段) - **官方技术披露**: - tdcommons.org "Utilizing the Linux Userfaultfd System Call in a Compaction Phase of a GC" (Google 公开的 CMC 算法说明) - **AOSP commit 854cb7d**: 确认 CMC 是 Android S+ 默认 (`Using CollectorTypeCMC GC`) 被推翻的训练数据假设: 无 — 关键 API (`UFFDIO_REGISTER` / `UFFDIO_COPY` / `mremap`)、阶段名 (InitializePhase / MarkingPhase / MarkingPause / ReclaimPhase / PrepareForCompaction / CompactionPause / CompactionPhase / FinishPhase) 与 AOSP master 完全一致。 --- > 💡 你的 SDK 36 coredump (`system_server_12445_11.core`) 实际跑的就是 CMC。如果想验证它的 GC 类型,可以在 core 里找 `Runtime::heap_::collector_type_` (CollectorType=`kCollectorTypeCMC`=9) — 这块要加到你的 `cmd_class` / heap 命令里,我可以帮你接进去。是否需要沉淀到 `docs/exploration/12-art-cmc-gc.md`? Respond in this XML format: [Short title capturing the user's request AND the substance of what was discussed/done] [What has been explored so far? What was examined?] [What have you learned about how things work?] [What work has been completed so far? What has shipped or changed?] [What are you actively working on or planning to work on next in this session?] [Additional insights or observations about the current progress] REMINDER: Your response MUST use as the root tag, NOT . IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one. Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content. Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

message.content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>gc过程的markl跟sweep是什么阶段做的操作,具体操作干了啥,目的是啥</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-14</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

message.content:
--- MODE SWITCH: PROGRESS SUMMARY --- ⚠️ CRITICAL TAG REQUIREMENT — READ CAREFULLY: • You MUST wrap your ENTIRE response in ... tags. • Do NOT use tags. output will be DISCARDED and cause a system error. • The ONLY accepted root tag is . Any other root tag is a protocol violation. PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT =========================== Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request. Claude's Full Response to User: # Android ART CMC GC: Mark-Compact 完整流程详解 [知识来源: Web 搜索 - 4 引擎并行] - Serper Google: `Android ART MarkCompact userfaultfd concurrent mark compact GC Android 14` - DuckDuckGo: `ART MarkCompact RunPhases CompactionPhase userfaultfd uffd live word` - Tavily (advanced): `Android 14 ART Mark Compact garbage collector userfaultfd implementation phases sliding compaction` - MiniMax 中文: `Android 14 ART CMC GC mark compact 用户态缺页 userfaultfd 滑动压缩 阶段` [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/mark_compact.cc] [知识来源: AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/art/+/master/runtime/gc/collector/mark_compact.h] [知识来源: 技术披露 - Utilizing the Linux Userfaultfd System Call in a Compaction Phase of a GC, tdcommons.org] [置信度: 高] (task list 跟当前一次性 Q&A 关系不大,跳过 TaskCreate;如果你后续要把这部分沉淀到 `docs/exploration/`,那一步再开 task。) --- ## 0. 为什么 ART 要从 CC 切到 CMC CC (Concurrent Copying, Android 8 ~ 13 默认) 的代价: - **空间冗余**: from-space 和 to-space 各占一份,实际可用堆 ≈ 物理堆 / 2 - **Read Barrier 永远在线**: 每次读引用字段都走一次 RB slow-path 检查 forwarding,有 CPU 开销 - **GC 期间 working set 翻倍**: 拷贝过程同时占用 from + to,峰值 RSS 高 CMC (Concurrent Mark Compact, Android 14+ 默认) 的卖点: - **就地压缩**: 同一段虚拟地址空间被压缩,无需另开一份 to-space → **省半数堆 RAM** - **无需 Read Barrier**: 用 **userfaultfd (uffd)** 让 kernel 在 mutator 访问"还没搬完"的页时阻塞,GC 线程把页搬好后 `UFFDIO_COPY` ioctl 唤醒 — 等价于"按需的 read barrier",但是免费的 (kernel 帮你做) - **碎片消失**: compaction 自带 defrag,长期跑下来不会出现"明明有 20MB 空闲但分配不下 8MB Bitmap"的情况 代价: 内核必须 ≥ 5.7 (`UFFD_FEATURE_SIGBUS` 才能开启 CMC),否则 fall back 到 CC。 --- ## 1. 主流程 `MarkCompact::RunPhases()` AOSP master 源码原文: ```cpp void MarkCompact::RunPhases() { InitializePhase(); { ReaderMutexLock mu(self, *Locks::mutator_lock_); MarkingPhase(); } // 并发 { ScopedPause pause(this); MarkingPause(); } // STW { ReaderMutexLock mu(self, *Locks::mutator_lock_); ReclaimPhase(); perform_compaction = PrepareForCompaction(); } // 并发 if (perform_compaction) { runtime->GetThreadList()->FlipThreadRoots(...); // STW (FlipCallback → CompactionPause) if (IsValidFd(uffd_)) { ReaderMutexLock mu(self, *Locks::mutator_lock_); CompactionPhase(); // 并发,核心! } } FinishPhase(perform_compaction); } ``` 七个阶段, **两个 STW pause**: ``` ┌─ InitializePhase (准备) ├─ MarkingPhase (并发) ──┐ ├─ MarkingPause ★ STW ├─ Mark 系列,跟 CMS 几乎一样 ├─ ReclaimPhase (并发) ──┘ ├─ PrepareForCompaction (并发,核心算法) ├─ CompactionPause ★ STW (FlipThreadRoots) ├─ CompactionPhase (并发,userfaultfd 驱动) ← CMC 的灵魂 └─ FinishPhase ``` --- ## 2. 第一段: Mark 系列 (1 ~ 4 阶段) ### 2.1 InitializePhase - 清空 `mark_stack_`、`chunk_info_vec_`、`first_objs_moving_space_`/`first_objs_non_moving_space_` 等数据结构 - 重置计数器,缓存 `from_space_slide_diff` (`from_space_begin_ - bump_pointer_space_->Begin()`) - 代际模式 (`use_generational_`) 下清空 `class_after_obj_map_` **目的**: 给本轮 GC 准备干净的状态机。 ### 2.2 MarkingPhase (并发) 跟 CMS 的 mark 阶段几乎相同: - `BindAndResetBitmaps()`: 圈定 immune space,重置主 space 的 mark bitmap - `MarkRoots()`: 线程根 / JNI / 类加载器 / intern strings - `MarkReachableObjects()` + `ScanObject()` + `ProcessMarkStack()`: 三色追踪 - write barrier + card table 处理并发期间引用变更 **目的**: 跟 CMS 一样 — 在 mark bitmap 中标出"所有从根可达的对象"。 ### 2.3 MarkingPause (STW 补漏) - **撤销 TLAB**: `RevokeAllThreadLocalBuffers()` — TLAB (Thread Local Allocation Buffer) 是 mutator 在 bump pointer space 中私有的分配缓冲,STW 前必须撤回主分配指针 - **设定 `black_allocations_begin_`**: 这是一个关键水位线 — STW 之后所有新分配出来的对象都在它之后,统一视为"黑色 (已存活)",不需要重新 trace - `ReMarkRoots()`: 重扫根,catch 并发期间新增的 - `RecursiveMarkDirtyObjects()`: 扫脏 card 上的灰对象 - `SwapStacks()`: 翻转 alloc / live stack - `EnableSlowPath()`: 让 Reference 处理走 slow path,准备 sweep system weaks **目的**: 把并发标记的"漏标"补齐;立一条 `black_allocations_begin_` 水位线,把"STW 前的对象"和"STW 后的对象"分开处理。 ### 2.4 ReclaimPhase (这里是非 moving space 的 sweep) - `ProcessReferences()`: Soft/Weak/Phantom/Finalizer 同 CMS - `SweepSystemWeaks()`: intern table、JIT inline cache、JNI weak global - `Sweep()` + `SwapBitmaps()`: **只 sweep 非 moving space (large object space / non-moving space)** - `UnBindBitmaps()` **这里有个关键区别**: moving space (bump-pointer space) **不在 sweep 范围内**,它的死对象不需要逐个还给 freelist — 因为接下来 compaction 会把活对象搬走、整片 from-space 直接释放。 --- ## 3. 第二段: Compact 系列 (5 ~ 7 阶段) — CMC 的精华 ### 3.1 PrepareForCompaction (并发,核心算法) 这是 CMC 最巧妙的部分,准备"**每个对象搬到哪里**"。 **输入**: mark bitmap (谁活着) + chunk_info_vec_ (按 chunk 统计活字节数) **输出**: 一组前缀和数组,用来 O(1) 查询任意对象的 post-compaction 地址 具体做的事: #### ① ComputeLiveWordsBitmap / chunk_info_vec_ - 把 moving space 切成固定大小的 chunk (典型 4 KB / page) - 对每个 chunk 统计"存活字节数 (live bytes)" - 形成数组 `chunk_info_vec_[i]` = chunk i 的活字节数 #### ② 计算前缀和 - 累加 `chunk_info_vec_`,得到"chunk i 之前一共有多少活字节" - 这就是 chunk i 整体压缩后的目标偏移 - 对于具体对象,再加上它在 chunk 内的偏移 → 得到 post-compaction 精确地址 #### ③ 确定多重边界 代码里有三条关键水位线: - **`black_dense_end_`**: chunk 存活率 ≥ `kBlackDenseRegionThreshold = 95%` 的连续前缀。这段区域 **跳过 compaction** (太满了,搬没意义) - **`mid_gen_end_`** (代际模式): 中代结束位置 - **`post_compact_end_`**: compaction 完成后的堆终点 源码注释: > "different mutators use TLABs. So we will compact the heap till the point where allocations took place before the marking-pause. And everything after that will be slid with TLAB holes" #### ④ 构建 first-objects 表 - `first_objs_moving_space_[page_idx]` = 落入第 page_idx 个目标页的第一个对象 - compaction 时只需从这个对象起,顺序搬一页的内容 **目的**: 把"压缩"这个全局算法,**预计算成局部独立的 page-level 任务**。每个 page 的压缩工作互不依赖 → 后面 CompactionPhase 才能并行/按需做。 `perform_compaction` 是这一步的返回值;如果堆几乎都活着,可以跳过 compact。 ### 3.2 CompactionPause (STW, 通过 FlipCallback) `runtime->GetThreadList()->FlipThreadRoots(...)` 会: - 暂停所有 mutator - 对每个线程调一次 `ThreadFlipVisitor`,改写线程私有引用 (TLAB 指针、interpreter cache 等) - 在 callback 内执行 `CompactionPause()`: - **KernelPreparation()**: 头文件注释原文: > "Perform all kernel operations required for concurrent compaction. Includes mremap to move pre-compact pages to from-space, followed by userfaultfd registration on the moving space and linear-alloc." - 核心操作 = `mremap()`: 把整个 moving space 的虚拟页用 mremap 移到 from-space 的虚拟地址范围 → **moving space 此刻变成空映射** - 然后在 moving space 那段虚拟地址范围上 `UFFDIO_REGISTER` 注册 userfaultfd → 从此 mutator 访问这段范围会触发 **SIGBUS** (或 uffd 缺页事件) - 更新所有线程根的引用,使其指向"压缩后的地址" (用前面算好的前缀和) - 清空 interpreter cache、调整 TLAB - pause 结束,恢复 mutator **目的**: 在 STW 内做两件原子的事 — ① 把所有现存指针改到压缩后的目标地址; ② 让 moving space 变成 "uffd 防护区" (任何访问都会被内核挂起)。 ### 3.3 CompactionPhase (并发,核心!) 这是 CMC 区别于所有其他 GC 的关键。 mutator 已经被 unsuspend,它们看到的引用都指向**压缩后的目标地址 (即原 moving space 的虚拟地址)**。但那块内存现在是空映射(被 uffd 接管)。 接下来发生: #### 路径 A: mutator 访问 → SIGBUS 触发 1. mutator 线程读/写一个引用 → 访问 moving space 中某页 P 2. 内核发现 P 没有物理页支持,且被 uffd 监控 → 发出 SIGBUS 3. ART 的 `SigbusHandler(siginfo_t* info)` 接管 (头文件注释: "Called by SIGBUS handler. NO_THREAD_SAFETY_ANALYSIS for mutator-lock") 4. handler 调用 `ConcurrentlyProcessMovingPage(fault_page, buf, ...)`: - 用前面准备的 first-objects 表找到该页对应的源对象 - 从 from-space (mremap 之前的位置) 把活对象 **拷贝到 buf** (`compaction_buffer_`) - 拷贝过程中用 `CompactPage<>` / `SlideBlackPage` **就地更新对象内引用** (因为目标地址已知) - 调用 `UFFDIO_COPY` ioctl,把 buf 内容映射回 P → P 现在有物理页了 5. 内核 resume mutator,mutator 看到的就是已就位的对象 — 它完全感知不到刚才发生了什么 #### 路径 B: GC 线程主动搬 GC 线程不等 mutator 访问,自己也从 page 0 开始逐页搬运: - 取一页,标 `PageState::kProcessing` (`Atomic* moving_pages_status_`) - 拷贝并修复引用 - `UFFDIO_COPY` 映射回去 - 标 `kProcessedAndMapped` #### 同步: PageState 状态机 每页有 7 种状态: ``` kUnprocessed → kProcessing → kProcessed → kProcessingAndMapping → kMutatorProcessing → kProcessedAndMapping → kProcessedAndMapped ``` 保证 GC 线程和 mutator (经 SIGBUS) 不会同时处理同一页。 #### 终止机制 - `conc_compaction_termination_page_`: 单独注册了一个"终止页",GC 完成所有页后访问它 → 触发 uffd 事件 → SIGBUS handler 看到 sigbus_in_progress_count_ 的 `kSigbusCounterCompactionDoneMask` → 知道压缩已结束 → 之后访问任意页都直接放行 - 内核 ≥ 5.7 的 fault-retry 特性 (`gKernelHasFaultRetry`) 简化了这块,允许同一页多次 fault #### linear-alloc 区域 ART 的 linear-alloc 池 (ArenaPool) 也得搬: - `ProcessLinearAlloc()`: GC 线程并发处理,用 `shadow-map` 临时映射 **目的**: 在 mutator 几乎不停顿的情况下,把所有活对象搬到压缩后位置,并把死对象的虚拟地址空间整体回收。userfaultfd 让 "lazy compaction" 成为可能 — 谁先访问谁先触发搬运,GC 线程在背景慢慢做。 ### 3.4 FinishPhase - 解注册 uffd (`UnregisterUffd`) - `FreeFromSpacePages()`: madvise(DONTNEED) 释放 from-space 的物理页 - 代际模式: 把 mid → old 的提升位复制到 mark bitmap - 关闭 ReferenceProcessor slow path - 重置 mark stack、统计输出 **目的**: 释放整片 from-space 内存 (这是 "等价 sweep" 的真正物理回收),收尾。 --- ## 4. 三种 GC 的横向对比 | 维度 | CMS (MarkSweep) | CC (ConcurrentCopying) | CMC (MarkCompact) | |---|---|---|---| | AOSP 默认期 | Android 5 ~ 7 | Android 8 ~ 13 | Android 14+ | | 标记阶段 | 三色,带 card table | 三色 + read barrier | 三色,带 card table (无 RB) | | 死对象回收方式 | 还给 freelist (Sweep) | 整片 from-space 释放 | 整片 from-space 释放 | | 是否压缩/搬移 | ❌ 会碎片化 | ✅ 拷贝到 to-space | ✅ 就地压缩 (mremap + uffd) | | 物理峰值堆 | 1x | 2x (from + to) | 1x (mremap 共享地址) | | Mutator 开销 | write barrier | **read barrier (热!)** | write barrier + 偶发 SIGBUS | | STW 数 | 2 (Pause + Reclaim 头) | 多 (Flip + 各 checkpoint) | 2 (MarkingPause + CompactionPause) | | 内核要求 | 无 | 无 | **≥ 5.7,需 userfaultfd SIGBUS** | | 碎片 | 严重 | 无 | 无 | --- ## 5. 完整流程图 ```mermaid flowchart TD A[GC trigger] --> B[InitializePhase
重置状态] B --> C[MarkingPhase
并发 三色追踪] C --> D[MarkingPause
★STW] D --> D1[RevokeTLAB
black_allocations_begin_ 立水位] D1 --> D2[ReMarkRoots / Dirty cards] D2 --> E[ReclaimPhase
并发 sweep 非 moving space] E --> E1[ProcessReferences/SystemWeaks] E1 --> E2[Sweep large/non-moving
moving space 不在此处] E2 --> F[PrepareForCompaction
并发] F --> F1[ComputeLiveWords
chunk_info_vec_] F1 --> F2[前缀和 → 算出每页目标地址] F2 --> F3[确定 black_dense_end
post_compact_end] F3 --> F4[first_objs 表] F4 --> G[CompactionPause
★STW via FlipThreadRoots] G --> G1[KernelPreparation
mremap 把 moving 搬到 from-space] G1 --> G2[UFFDIO_REGISTER
注册 uffd 监控 moving space] G2 --> G3[更新所有线程根指针
指向压缩后地址] G3 --> H[CompactionPhase
并发,uffd 驱动] H --> H1[GC 线程逐页搬
CompactPage/SlideBlackPage] H --> H2[mutator 访问 → SIGBUS
SigbusHandler 按需搬这页] H1 --> H3[UFFDIO_COPY ioctl
把搬好的页映射回去] H2 --> H3 H3 --> H4[PageState 状态机同步] H4 --> I[Termination Page
所有页处理完触发终止] I --> J[FinishPhase
UnregisterUffd] J --> J1[FreeFromSpacePages
madvise DONTNEED] J1 --> J2[统计/清理] ``` --- ## 6. 一句话总结(直接回答) | 问题 | 答案 | |---|---| | **Mark 阶段干啥?** | 跟 CMS 一样 — 三色追踪,把 live 对象标到 mark bitmap。MarkingPause 立 `black_allocations_begin_` 水位线把"老对象/新对象"分开 | | **Compact 阶段干啥?** | 用 mremap 把整片 moving space 搬到 from-space (改名而已,虚拟页不动),原 moving space 注册 uffd → mutator 一访问就 SIGBUS → GC 线程按需把对象 **按预计算的目标地址** 拷回去 → ioctl 映射 → mutator 透明继续 | | **为啥需要 PrepareForCompaction?** | 算前缀和,让每页的压缩任务 **彼此独立** — 这样 GC 线程和 SIGBUS handler 才能并发各搬各的 | | **死对象内存何时回收?** | FinishPhase 的 `FreeFromSpacePages()` 用 `madvise(DONTNEED)` 一次性释放整片 from-space,不需要遍历死对象 | | **跟 CC 比省在哪?** | 不要 to-space (物理 RAM 砍半),不要 read barrier (mutator 热路径无开销),代价是依赖内核 uffd + 偶尔 SIGBUS | | **跟 CMS 比省在哪?** | 没有碎片,长期跑 RSS 稳定;不要逐对象还给 freelist 的 Sweep | --- ## 知识来源(本轮实际调用) - **4 引擎 Web 搜索**: - Serper Google: `Android ART MarkCompact userfaultfd concurrent mark compact GC Android 14` - DuckDuckGo: `ART MarkCompact RunPhases CompactionPhase userfaultfd uffd live word` - Tavily (advanced): `Android 14 ART Mark Compact garbage collector userfaultfd implementation phases sliding compaction` - MiniMax: `Android 14 ART CMC GC mark compact 用户态缺页 userfaultfd 滑动压缩 阶段` - **AOSP master 源码交叉验证**: - `art/runtime/gc/collector/mark_compact.cc` (RunPhases 全流程 / userfaultfd 注释 / kBlackDenseRegionThreshold=95%) -
